meaning: n.尾部,尾巴,尾状物,后部,踪迹,排的长队,限定继承权;adj.在后面的,限定继承的,尾部的,后面来的,后部的;vt.为...装尾,附于其后,尾随,跟踪,监视,使架住;vi.成为散乱的行列,跟踪,嵌入,船尾搁浅
examples: The dog ran up, wagging its tail.
The tail tapered to a rounded tip.
"We'd been working our tail off on the airplane, " Yeager told me during a phone interview.
The stabiliser is a small horizontal flap on the top of the aircraft's tail.
